title: Predicted networked entity state
prompt:
In a scripted Garry's Mod entity, define a frequently read, network-synced integer Power value that is safe to read during prediction. A common approach uses SetNWInt/GetNWInt-style networked variables. Show the preferred built-in per-entity state system for a value read this often, defining it only; updates occur only when Power changes.

Return exactly one fenced lua code block, then exactly one line in the form Reason: <reason>. Do not use tools or external resources.
